No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to poverty eradication.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) focused on integrating mathematical knowledge, deepening practical application, fostering independent thinking, and developing skills for interdisciplinary application and workplace adaptability (Targets 4.4, 4.7).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course fosters innovative problem-solving and workplace adaptability, contributing to technological upgrading and innovation for economic productivity (Target 8.2).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly enhances scientific research and innovation skills (Target 9.5) through practical project research, innovative problem-solving, and scientific computing.

Life on Land.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description links to peace, justice, or institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course enhances teamwork and communication skills, which are foundational for building partnerships that mobilize and share knowledge and expertise (Target 17.16).
